backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing CRUD operations for students, instructors, aircraft, exercises, and flight logs with in-memory Map storage and auto-incrementing flight log IDs.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three requirements (REQ-19, REQ-20, REQ-21) related to flight log form update button, date picker functionality, and close button behavior in edit mode.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of 13 frontend files covering components, hooks, utilities, and configuration for the flight logbook application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode design tokens for the aviation-themed UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Pilot Flight Logbook application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing tab navigation, entity dialogs, flight log editing state, and coordinating between FlightLogForm, FlightLogTable, reports, and export functionality.
Reusable dialog component for creating students, instructors, aircraft, and exercises with form validation, UUID generation, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ExportButton.tsx: Button component that fetches CSV data from backend actor, creates a downloadable blob with formatted filename, and displays loading/success states.
frontend/src/components/FlightLogForm.ts: Form component for creating and editing flight log entries with fields for date, student, instructor, aircraft, exercise, flight type, landing details, and times. Handles form submission, validation, and calculates total flight hours.
frontend/src/components/FlightLogTable.t: Table component that displays all flight log entries with columns for date, student, instructor, aircraft, exercise, type, landings, times, and total hours. Provides edit and delete actions with confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/components/InstructorReport: Report component that displays aggregated data for instructors including total flight hours and flight count per instructor in a table format.
frontend/src/components/StudentReport.ts: Report component that displays total flight hours per student in a table format.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, creating authenticated or anonymous actors and invalidating queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useEntities.ts: Custom hooks for fetching all students, instructors, aircraft, and exercises from the backend, plus a mutation hook for creating new entities of each type.
frontend/src/hooks/useFlightLogs.ts: Custom hooks for flight log CRUD operations including fetching all logs with resolved foreign key names, creating, updating, and deleting flight logs.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and providing authentication status throughout the application.
frontend/src/hooks/useReports.ts: Provides React Query hooks (useStudentReport and useInstructorReport) that fetch and aggregate flight hours and counts for students and instructors from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining colors for UI components like buttons, cards, borders, and charts.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/timeCalculations.ts: Utility functions for parsing time strings (HH:MM), formatting minutes to human-readable format, and calculating flight duration between takeoff and landing times including midnight crossings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, and accordion animations with typography and container query plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a Pilot Flight Logbook application with single-file architecture, CSV-based persistence, and features for flight tracking, entity management, and reporting.
